news.title: Anthropic temporarily banned OpenClaw’s creator from accessing Claude
news.summary: This ban took place after Claude's pricing changed for OpenClaw users last week.

news.title: Stalking victim sues OpenAI, claims ChatGPT fueled her abuser’s delusions and ignored her warnings
news.summary: OpenAI ignored three warnings that a ChatGPT user was dangerous — including its own mass-casualty flag — while he stalked and harassed his ex-girlfriend, a new lawsuit alleges.

news.title: TechCrunch is heading to Tokyo — and bringing the Startup Battlefield with it

news.title: Last 24 hours: Save up to $500 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass
news.summary: This is it. Tonight is your last chance to lock in savings of up to $500 for your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass. These discounts end at 11:59 p.m. PT.

news.title: Anthropic’s Mythos Will Force a Cybersecurity Reckoning—Just Not the One You Think
news.summary: The new AI model is being heralded—and feared—as a hacker’s superweapon. Experts say its arrival is a wake-up call for developers who have long made security an afterthought.

news.title: Suspect Arrested for Allegedly Throwing Molotov Cocktail at Sam Altman’s Home
news.summary: An attacker allegedly threw a molotov cocktail at the OpenAI CEO’s residence before making threats outside of the startup’s headquarters.

news.title: This Startup Wants You to Pay Up to Talk With AI Versions of Human Experts
news.summary: Onix is launching a “Substack of bots,” where digital twins of health and wellness influencers dispense advice 24/7. And maybe hawk their products.
